message:
chore(fcp-core): update test vectors for enrollment and simulation

Regenerated CBOR test vectors to match current schema expectations.
These binary fixtures are used by property-based tests to verify
serialization round-trips remain stable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
